name: web_search
label: Web Search
description: Search the public web via Tavily. Use when the user asks about recent news, real-time facts, current events, prices, or anything the model may not know from training (post-training cutoff). Returns AI answer (when available) plus top results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

query.description: Search query in the user's original language. Be specific.

max_results.description: Number of results to return. Default 5, max 10.

search_depth.description: Tavily search depth. 'basic' is fast and free; 'advanced' spends more credits for deeper analysis. Default 'basic'.
